questionHtml:
What is the molecular geometry of SF4?

A.  Tetrahedral

B.  Trigonal bipyramidal

C.  See-saw

D.  Square planar

meta.title: What is the molecular geometry of SF4? A. Tetrahedral B. Trigonal bipyramidal C. See-saw D. Square planar
